column1: # qpAdm deep-ancestry component map — AADR Group ID (col15 of the .anno) → component code.
# The SHIPPING deep-ancestry config: Patterson et al. 2022 sources + sister outgroups (§7.14).
# DEDICATED (not aadr_component_map.tsv) so the qpAdm WHG source stays the narrow Western-Mesolithic
# set Patterson used (France_Mesolithic + Loschbour), NOT the broad strengthened Villabruna set the
# shared map assigns to WHG. Consumed by 06_build_qpadm_panel.sh; codes match qpadm_{left,right}pops.txt.
# Validated on huF98AFD: WHG 14.6 / EEF 44.8 / Steppe 40.6 (= admixtools2, stability gate passed).
